summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN car wash management system - Iteration 4. All backend APIs (30/30 tests passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Tested Dashboard KPIs, Advanced Analytics, Day Management, Services CRUD, Inventory CRUD, Workers CRUD, Shifts CRUD, and Image Upload functionality.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation (non-standard HTTP status code)

passed_tests: API health check (/api/) - returns X-CLEAN API v1.0.0
Authentication with test_fresh_session token
Dashboard KPI cards: Mai autók, Mai készpénz, Mai kártya, Havi autók, Havi készpénz, Havi kártya
Dashboard Advanced Analytics: Átl. bevétel/autó, Visszatérő ügyfelek, Month comparison cards
Dashboard Advanced Analytics: Bevétel dolgozónként, Bevétel telephelyenként, TOP 10 ügyfél
Day Management page: Napnyitás/Napzárás status display
Day Management page: Location selector with Budapest/Debrecen
Day Management API: /api/day-records/today, /api/day-records/open, /api/day-records/close
Services page: Category tabs (Komplett, Külső, Belső, Extra)
Services page: 'Új szolgáltatás' button opens dialog
Services page: Edit and Delete buttons visible on service cards
Services CRUD: Create, Update, Delete all working
Inventory page: Table with products, headers visible
Inventory page: 'Új termék' button opens dialog
Inventory page: Edit (inline) and Delete buttons visible in rows
Inventory page: Low stock warning (Alacsony készlet figyelmeztetés)
Inventory CRUD: Create, Update, Delete all working
Workers page: Dolgozók tab with workers table
Workers page: Add (Új dolgozó), Edit, Delete buttons visible
Workers page: Műszakbeosztás tab with calendar view
Workers page: 'Új műszak' button visible in calendar view
Workers page: Heti/Havi (Weekly/Monthly) view toggles
Workers page: Worker color legend at bottom
Shifts CRUD: Create and Delete working
Image upload dialog: Előtte/Utána (Before/After) sections
Image upload dialog: Feltöltés (Upload) buttons visible
Image gallery: Images displayed correctly (1/9 max)
Location filter: Works on Dashboard and other pages
Hungarian language: All UI elements in Hungarian
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest (TEST_ prefixed) was cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features are working correctly. Test session 'test_fresh_session' with user 'admin@xclean.hu' is valid until 2026-03-11. Day records for both Budapest and Debrecen have been opened and closed for today (2026-03-04). The app has 40 services, 5 workers, and 12 inventory items. Advanced analytics endpoint at /api/stats/advanced provides comprehensive data including avg_revenue_per_car, returning_customers, top_customers, employee_revenue, location_revenue, and month_comparison.
